# @codenhub/vite-plugin-defer-css

> Experimental Vite plugin that changes static stylesheet links into preloads and restores them in the browser.

Use the sole package entrypoint. The HTML transform runs in development and builds with post ordering. Review CSP and unstyled-content risks; missing `</head>` produces transformed links without fallback injection.

## Documentation

- [Documentation overview](docs/index.md): Scope, stability, requirements, and navigation.
- [Integration and API](docs/integration.md): Registration, plugin order, matching, and every public export.
- [Transformed output and constraints](docs/output-and-constraints.md): Emitted HTML, CSP, rendering impact, and failures.
